summary: Comprehensive testing of Light/Dark Theme Mode feature. All theme toggle buttons verified on LandingPage, AuthPage, and Navbar. Theme persistence across navigation and localStorage working correctly. Both themes render properly across all pages with good contrast and readability.

theme_toggle_tests: Landing page theme toggle (data-testid='landing-theme-toggle') visible and working - PASS
Auth page theme toggle (data-testid='auth-theme-toggle') visible in top-right corner - PASS
Main navbar theme toggle (data-testid='theme-toggle') visible after login - PASS
Theme toggle switches between dark/light correctly - PASS
Sun icon shows in dark mode (click for light) - PASS
Moon icon shows in light mode (click for dark) - PASS
light_mode_visual_tests: Landing page - white/light backgrounds, dark text, green primary accent - PASS
Auth page - proper contrast on form elements and glass-card - PASS
Dashboard - stat cards, booking list readable with good contrast - PASS
Venues page - venue cards, filters, search bar all styled correctly - PASS
VenueDetail page - slots, calendar, info bar readable - PASS
VenueDetail reviews section - star bars, review cards, text contrast good - PASS
Owner Dashboard - stats, tabs, booking cards all readable - PASS
Owner Dashboard History tab - timeline items styled correctly - PASS
Owner Dashboard Reviews tab - review cards readable - PASS
dark_mode_visual_tests: Landing page - dark backgrounds, light text, green primary accent - PASS
Auth page - glass-card effects, proper contrast - PASS
Dashboard - glass-card styling, dark backgrounds - PASS
Venues page - venue cards with proper dark styling - PASS
VenueDetail page - slots, calendar in dark theme - PASS
VenueDetail reviews section - dark theme styling maintained - PASS
Owner Dashboard - all tabs styled correctly in dark mode - PASS
functionality_after_theme_change: Login works after theme toggle - PASS
Venue search works with theme applied - PASS
Navigation between pages preserves theme - PASS
Clicking venue cards navigates correctly - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.js properly implements localStorage persistence with 'horizon-theme' key
CSS variables for both themes are well-defined in index.css with proper color values
Theme transition is smooth with 0.3s ease timing
Glass-card adaptive styles work correctly for both themes
All interactive elements maintain proper data-testid attributes
Theme toggle icons (Sun/Moon) correctly indicate current mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle feature fully tested. Theme toggle data-testids: 'landing-theme-toggle' (landing page), 'auth-theme-toggle' (auth page), 'theme-toggle' (main navbar after login). Theme stored in localStorage key 'horizon-theme' with values 'dark' or 'light'. CSS uses class-based theming on html element. Both themes have proper contrast and all pages render correctly in both modes.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment gateway: MOCKED - Using mock-confirm endpoint for booking confirmation
